category_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts files from InstallShield cabinet files; official GitHub README describes extracting Microsoft Cabinet files from InstallShield Cabinet files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Unshield; source_facts.name is unshield.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for Unshield.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/twogood/unshield, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies InstallShield cabinet extraction; official README defines InstallShield Cabinet File and Microsoft Cabinet File use cases; current_curation.tags includes cli.
